title: Fall of the Western Roman Empire
description: The deposition of Romulus Augustulus traditionally marks the end of ancient Rome in the West.

title: Islam Begins
description: Muhammad's first revelations mark the beginning of Islam in Arabia.

title: Tang Dynasty Founded
description: The Tang Dynasty begins one of the most influential eras in Chinese history.

title: Mongol Empire Begins
description: Temujin becomes Genghis Khan and unites the Mongol tribes.

title: Black Death
description: The plague devastates Afro-Eurasia and kills tens of millions of people.

title: Printing Press
description: Gutenberg's movable-type press accelerates the spread of books and ideas in Europe.
